sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41" key="a)baki/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀβᾰκίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n41.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀβακέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:74" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
